mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (title, content, type, status, attempts, borrow_id, user_id, sender_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{attempts}, #{borrowId}, #{userId}, #{senderUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET status = 1, read_at = IFNULL(read_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE notification SET status = 1, archived_at = NULL, read_at = IFNULL(read_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 ORDER BY archived_at DESC, updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET signed_at = IFNULL(signed_at, NOW()), status = CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, read_at = IFNULL(read_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE notification SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, replied_at = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, read_at = IFNULL(read_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, CONCAT('用户', n.user_id)) AS userName, n.status, DATE_FORMAT(n.read_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS readAt, DATE_FORMAT(n.signed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS signedAt, DATE_FORMAT(n.replied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS repliedAt FROM notification n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.user_id WHERE (n.borrow_id <=> (SELECT borrow_id FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1)) AND n.type = (SELECT type FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1) AND n.title = (SELECT title FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1) ORDER BY n.user_id ASC
